TRUMP: I will run for president if we take back the House
I know it's a Sunday morning, so I'll be quick: This is the most important ask I have ever made of you. Trump just vowed to run for President if Republicans unseat my Democratic Majority. And his donors rushed him $250 MILLION to do it. I need a historic response -- 3,000 gifts before my midnight deadline -- to protect my Democrats and make Trump’s plan BACKFIRE. This is so critical, I will personally 3X-match every single gift to ensure we keep the majority firmly in Democrats’ hands. >> [secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2021?refcode=20210324_em_fr_b1_pelosi_kennedy&amount=15]
I need you to make a crucial choice in this moment:
-- We can either let Trump shovel millions to Republicans, steal our Majority, and barge back into power...
-- Or we can rise up, send a historic response, and show Trump he will NEVER take the House from us.
Trump just hinged his entire Presidential run on reclaiming the House.
I will fight with everything I have to defend it from his grasp.
But I can’t do it alone -- not when he’s armed Republicans with $250 MILLION to defeat us.
Can I count on your $15 before my midnight deadline? This is so important to me, I will personally 3X-match your generous gift. Doc is working for Kansans and Americans in the U.S. Senate. He’s standing up to cancel culture, fighting to protect our rights, and doing everything he can to help Republicans take back the House and Senate in 2022.

**But Biden, Harris, and the Democrats are already raising MILLIONS to crush conservatives like Doc and keep their power.**

**None of this has made me any friends in the Swamp.** The liberal media, Big Tech, and Democrats across the country have all made me one of their top targets.

**And that’s just fine by me — but to continue making a difference, I need your help.**

Our FIRST End of Quarter Deadline is less than a week away — and we need to raise another $40,000 online. [**If you’re able, will you please chip in whatever you can?**](https://kansansformarshall.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=798e309beecf7512ab4f0f6d1&id=b8a796419c&e=0b94e583bc)

Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the Senate. "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Young Kim (R-CA) is an immigrant, small business owner and proud Conservative woman. Despite the cards being stacked against her, she was able to defy the odds and flip this district from BLUE to RED, pushing Republicans even closer to taking back the House Majority.
But her success was not one sided. She's the first to acknowledge that her victory would not have been possible without strong grassroots supporters like you by her side.
This cycle, our team faces even greater challenges, meaning it's even more important that we have your support. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Our first public filing deadline of the year
body:
#
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
| Hey there, it’s Ayanna, AOC, Ilhan, and Rashida! Ayanna
We’re adding you to our group text today because we need your help. AOC |
| The Squad has never been about just the four of us. It’s about building a nation we can all be proud of. Ilhan
**That’s why we are fighting with everything we’ve got for critical policies like the Green New Deal, recurring survival checks, a living wage, and Medicare for All.** Rashida |
| And we’re not slowing down – but we can’t do it alone. It’s critical that we reach our first quarterly fundraising goal of 2021 so we can keep growing this movement. Ayanna
[Will you chip in $3, or anything you can, to help us raise $100,000 before our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year? It’s an ambitious goal, but together we can knock it out of the park.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8446?refcode=aoc-em20210327-1976&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h) AOC |
| Can you believe it’s been nearly three months since we started our second terms in Congress? Ilhan
We’re so proud to be leading the fight for transformative progressive policies like Medicare for All – but those fights are far from over. Rashida |
| And our movement for a bold, progressive future is entirely powered by people like you chipping in $5, $15, or whatever you can. Ayanna
When you chip in toward a major grassroots goal like this, you’re helping Ayanna, Ilhan, Rashida, and me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for change. AOC |
| [If you can afford it, will you show your support and chip in to help the Squad reach our first quarterly fundraising goal of the year? Thank you for being a part of our movement.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8446?refcode=aoc-em20210327-1976&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h) Ilhan
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8446?refcode=aoc-em20210327-1976&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h)**
* * *
Thank you so much for being a part of the Squad. With your support, we will continue to center people and keep fighting for justice.
– Alexandria, Ilhan, Rashida, & Ayanna –

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/squad-victory?refcode=em20210327-1976-footer&t=22&refcode2=1976_2526796_Zz8-5h&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h)
Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.
In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 12.5% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1976%2E2526796%2EZz8-5h). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

clean_body: What should Republicans focus on this year? Fellow Conservative, Our team has an important question for you. In 2021, there have been so many issues worthy of attention by our Republican leadership, but because of your record of being a conservative leader in your area, we are reaching out to you to hear what you think! What issue should Republican leadership focus the most on in the next few months? This survey is INTEGRAL to helping House Republicans know what they need to focus on in the next few months, as the Democrats try to block them at every turn! Quickly, Fellow Conservative. This survey will only be open for the next 12 hours ONLY! Thank you, Conservative Polling Team House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . body:

We can't let the Left get away with this.

Peter,

At the last minute of my special election, Democrats tried to
change the election rules to stop me from winning last year.

Now, Pelosi is trying to STEAL the congressional seat won by my
fellow Military veteran, Mariannette Miller-Meeks.

Because Mariannette only won by 6 VOTES, Democrats think they can
"eject" her from Congress and overturn an election.

After I only won my race by 333 votes, the Democrats will target
me next.

Please make a contribution before the FEC end-of-quarter deadline
to fight back against the Democrats who have already spent
$500,000 just this year to defeat me.

Patriot,

[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/UrGO-DIpvk3Xj3yxe7NE1BBIG3Bsl1IIf22Mo5a0B4IT_oFmB9DO2nb6yJGvd_vNf1A2_R0-IdsRo_DbbL4KGRzoJcBuBp1G3_BWuWdoI5KKasL0KHsjdELjVcCwAbYvdYKdkliSrg0XB6K_zt9ciFe4n0rC6bSsRFTAg8yzsTkX06Epq2HJF_jmVuLp1XnJN-AkCXbtPih_gRz7ssEs8c0PeoIzHQvwTu5atcCm80btquGVQnHYpkTxyleXULcIkqWDP-rOEowEi7aRXOGSFNIlXPQ134k5F3cl0gk_UdxwksV92t6Pp6Q) 22 veterans commit suicide every single day.

**Help22 is doing what we can to prevent that** ... by providing America’s heroes with the emotional and psychological support they need.

[**Will you help us continue to grow... and continue to save the lives of America’s heroes... by making a tax-deductible gift of just $22 or more to Help 22?**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/9EOa7qRuMTeEDtTr4NGWm8S7D59vNVxHuvrC7yyHBIcN8-jvveCpsIVTW_-tQ6acX5uQEA9ryLId36ybB_NsQHWJAuXJ11VqmGpW1CMLX4pXMc9rfISxKlZ0r7ZJ1s4t7KkXRd9T0cgX5D80zjVh-qb_xqOizulcdpFf6PKTTVc7XNBP0q_VCD6SjH8XzYG5oKNPbJgrKB8Oudv8k2BOCi5xR1ge1ZZCKoSvcUBuGm5bwf7ZRgzYk9E-UXBFBSortM6ktFOAjR1zBa7sOYWaubGJ49dGIk-op5jyvzZ0GJvMdexSlZ1a5P4)

My name is Commander Kirk Lippold, US Navy (Ret.)

In 2000, I was in command of the USS Cole when the ship was bombed by Al-Qaeda terrorists.

That day, I saw the horrors of war first-hand... and **like so many other veterans, the images of death and destruction have never left me**.

Too often, our heroes come home... and suffer in silence, with severe psychological symptoms. Simply put, **our nation needs to do more to help them resist giving up all hope**.

Help22 is leading the charge.

We’re assembling a **volunteer team of esteemed psychiatrists** , psychologists, life coaches and counselors from across the nation... and challenging them to **donate one day per month, to give free advice and counseling to America’s heroes**.

We know that every hour could save the lives of one of the 22 veterans who kill themselves each day. And we know that, if we all work together, **we can save lives, every day**.

[**Will you partner with Help22 to help us give America’s veterans the help they need... by making a tax-deductible gift of $11, $22, or even $44?**](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/xaMfz4JvzC1-rIDTK2BLbwDFO5CQhnZ6D8oyrYN_p4DVvMvenYOx8i-I18_k-XooTQOjToSL8I7uFxoKkRqDus93gpYO3bqUA8_SZUk5Hjw04EP6dnhc6VQACU4QsLwXBodKSG-pnBTFMaRx2Qwjz8bO00eah3UymKhs_w2J-viQIMIBJ0SkUUbwtexGctKdok1uUPSYVNjAgf4yktAYEJ7AagU5DZo2IzDlsRflS1fjZ_Jy9NY-3s0e5mS9MxNx75h6Mtaxm2JRRCE-3m_Roj298umC_nyh7YQkrED7-Sni8jYKLcOmEy8)

Thank you for your help.

Commander Kirk Lippold
US Navy (Ret.)

Help22 is pending as a Tax Exempt Organization Under Section 501(C)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Your Donations will be Tax Deductible As Allowed by Federal Law and the Laws of Various States upon approval.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. body:
These numbers prove that Democrats are already ahead and continuing to gain ground every single day. We're calling on you to get involved and help us reach our goal.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001miIoxReC0Visv9zjYdM99Yxw2XT8su-oCoQbfeNfRAVfJ6IosgTXgA1vcD8uzAs05Nszn1PoaXcPK_dvIFFT68UfVASO8HlicSoG9oc1Dzj7uwaQpEMbqfYfBJ8PkWKFYML32yrmuMytyV_H1_HGSmWH2XesKrFR-I5LEYiu_Ht_BwID1ebkJWkYjQ-X2M1lBYG7tIHqWHv8_SK8wN6_0U6BapHPOL0wLJJdW5Byv-qgg4fiUvGZUkLA2puDyOpzaflDxIM-8d1J9yXodDqdzegU7eGM6-4LZZWy-jWtxW5Fogn88K0tcEkEAuiM91S9LwjUop1JXNQGitz7MTLnGYUWTFg57zJggkRz4NEo8gjPKtGFUeEozHxs_EtL1s1bVqXIE_63c7zhawvy5OxWymfUVN-Uq_j-BJCbqi7bWxPyZtg-QbercFGOQvQ18KFR1UpNoXWHa70=&c=K-23yvHGs8wNspo6jV5fo7SEw8ZNa1qkAmUopaLp3ou7gMIXBTbX0Q==&ch=O3UuE3GFp0NcKV93J4gYvmlXIVkUnoK1Exg0Mwa3gC_Sepobh9UK3w==)

**FIRST:** House Democrats reported raising more than $11.5 MILLION _last_ month. **THEN:** News dropped they had more than $26 MILLION on hand _this_ month. **NOW: **Republicans are 823 contributions BEHIND their end-of-quarter goal. _The House Majority is THE battleground, Friend. These numbers prove that Democrats are already ahead and continuing to gain ground every single day._ This is a major threat to our conservative leaders in vulnerable districts. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20IN=20GOP=20Chairman?=
subject: Celebrating Passover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
As Passover begins, I hope every Hoosier is able to celebrate with loved ones. Read more >> | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470354?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1c2e1947e1&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Today marks the beginning of Passover, an important time for adherents of the Jewish and Christian faiths.

It’s one of the oldest religious festivals in Judaism, marking the time that God delivered their nation from slavery to Egypt. Christians today also use it to remember the sacrifice Jesus made for our sins, especially as Christ and the disciples were celebrating Passover during the Last Supper.

Throughout human history, God has stepped in and saved us, even when all hope had seemed lost. Especially after the difficult year we’ve had facing the COVID-19 pandemic, I’m reflecting on God’s mercy and grace, and praying for everyone who has been affected.

I hope that every Hoosier is able to celebrate this holy time of year with their loved ones.

God bless,
Kyle Hupfer, IN GOP Chairman
---
